method: Present-day analog candidates generated by grounded_model.py at 2026 for Natural Earth 10m populated places (pop_max >= 100000). The client computes sigma-dissimilarity (Mahony 2017) over standardized monthly temperature and log monthly precipitation, with an effective-dof + Satterthwaite calibration; > 4 sigma reports no modern equivalent.
source: Natural Earth 10m populated places (nvkelso natural-earth-vector) + WorldClim v2.1 observed baseline where available + raw CMIP6 ScenarioMIP temperature/precipitation, IPCC AR6 calibrated temperature reported alongside by grounded_model.py
